D2 Vision L3 Apply Reference

The Lilac Chaser

slide the speed, fix the centre cross, and watch a green disc chase a gap that holds only lilac dots

A blank slot runs around a ring of lilac dots. Adaptation paints the gap with lilac's green complement, while steady fixation lets the real dots fade — afterimage and Troxler fading together.

Slide the rotation speed and hold your gaze on the central cross. Within seconds a moving green disc appears in the gap, and soon the lilac dots themselves vanish, leaving only the green chaser circling.
